interface.shortDescription: Tuolin business agents for knowledge base, LinkedIn, and video creation workflows.
interface.longDescription: Codex-installed Tuolin business agent marketplace. Includes the local knowledge-base Agent, controlled LinkedIn campaign workflows, and an evidence-driven YouTube Shorts video workflow. Video creation reads formal product knowledge, challenges one business decision at a time, incorporates current YouTube and inspected-image evidence, shows plan and storyboard content directly in Codex, locks a standard SRT with the storyboard, and preserves confirmation-gated Dreamina handoff and assembly.
